title: AI companies will fail. We can salvage something from the wreckage | Cory Doctorow
annotation: AI companies will fail. We can salvage something from the wreckage | Cory Doctorow

og.title: AI companies will fail. We can salvage something from the wreckage | Cory Doctorow
og.description: AI is asbestos in the walls of our tech society, stuffed there by monopolists run amok. A serious fight against it must strike at its roots
